message.content:
The screenshot displays a **personal finance tracking mobile app** with a dark-themed, modern UI. Here’s a detailed breakdown:  


### **Status Bar (Top)**  
- **Time**: 10:38 am (left)  
- **Icons**: Moon (night mode), YouTube (notification), Wi-Fi, battery (62%), network (Vo LTE, R4G+), and data speed (7.04 K/s) (right).  


### **Header Section**  
- **Greeting**: “Good Morning,” in white text, followed by the user’s name, *“Moniram Tamang”* in pink text.  
- **Profile Icon**: A circular avatar with a yellow emoji-style face (right of the greeting).  


### **Total Balance Card**  
- **Background**: Gradient dark purple/pink.  
- **Icon**: Pink wallet icon (left).  
- **Text**: “Total Balance” (gray).  
- **Balance**: “₹14,860” (large white text).  
- **Trend Indicators**:  
  - Green badge: “+₹15,000” (upward arrow, income).  
  - Red badge: “-₹140” (downward arrow, expense).  


### **Income & Expenses Cards (Side-by-Side)**  
- **Income Card (Left)**:  
  - Background: Dark green.  
  - Icon: Green upward arrow (growth).  
  - Text: “Income” (white).  
  - Amount: “₹15,000” (bright green text).  

- **Expenses Card (Right)**:  
  - Background: Dark red.  
  - Icon: Red downward arrow (decline).  
  - Text: “Expenses” (white).  
  - Amount: “₹140” (bright red text).  


### **Recent Transactions Section**  
- **Title**: “Recent Transactions” (white text, left).  
- **“View All” Link**: Pink text with a right arrow (right, for full transaction history).  

- **Transaction 1 (Expense)**:  
  - Icon: Bar chart (purple background).  
  - Title: “Others Expense” (white).  
  - Subtitle: “Yesterday • Khaya fha” (gray).  
  - Amount: “-₹140” (red text).  
  - Tag: “Expense” (red badge).  

- **Transaction 2 (Income)**:  
  - Icon: Brown briefcase (green background).  
  - Title: “Salary” (white).  
  - Subtitle: “3 days ago • My Sala…” (gray, truncated).  
  - Amount: “+₹15,000” (green text).  
  - Tag: “Income” (green badge).  


### **Bottom Navigation Bar**  
- **Home**: Pink home icon + “Home” (pink text, active state).  
- **Stats**: Gray bar chart icon + “Stats” (gray text).  
- **Add Button**: Large pink circular button with a white “+” (center, for adding transactions).  
- **Report**: Gray document icon + “Report” (gray text).  
- **Setting**: Gray gear icon + “Setting” (gray text).  


### **Overall Design**  
- **Color Scheme**: Dark background (near-black) with vibrant accents (pink, green, red) for emphasis.  
- **Layout**: Clean, card-based structure with clear hierarchy (balance → income/expenses → transactions → navigation).  
- **Icons/Buttons**: Minimalist, intuitive icons (wallet, arrows, home, etc.) with high contrast for readability.  


This app focuses on **personal finance management**, displaying key metrics (balance, income, expenses) and recent transactions, with easy access to add new entries or navigate to other sections (stats, reports, settings).
